{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318255568A6E29DDC132E8739AE"}"},"total":236},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7344028163896296254","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"首先说文笔，很沉稳，读起来很舒服，其次说剧情，逻辑上没有什么明显错误，然后说人物，主角刻画的很鲜明，何进算是目前来说最大的亮点了，大将军怎么会只是一介屠夫呢。最后说设计，这本书截止到诸侯讨董开始，我还没有看到主角一上来就大搞特搞各种发明，大肆放出各种狂言，是天下群雄于无物，很好，不落俗套，值得深追。","text_exts":[{"e":67,"s":65,"text":"大将","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%86&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742615552E8739AE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227344028163896296254%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227317674546570480702%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%86%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709917245,"group_id":"7317674546570480702","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"知道我是谁不？知道的话和我说一声。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NynGLVAAdQJFOE0h/zXVxwjLs4cUm0b2EgGd3/pa7BkM","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4f7450d9233b49018457f1a3ddfd579c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793710&x-signature=w8xaU%2B7fAs645mEFowfNq3A%2BOKk%3D","user_id":"2872384314678012","user_name":"古人有言"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2872384314678012","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7317674546570480702","book_info":{"abstract":"《三国》《无系统》《无女主》《谋士文》
宁为太平犬，不为乱世人
谋己，谋人，谋国，谋天下
乱世中，如何能顾得其他人。
世之艰难，活之不易。
陈煜平生所想，只是为了单纯的活下来。
风雪夜，山神庙，偶遇张角
南阳郡，宛城外，与水镜为友
乱世大汉，终究因他的出现开始变得不一样。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e3f5e5353c0b81b8fb36c76b369dbcc2","author":"孤单的狐狸","author_id":"","book_id":"7317674546570480702","book_name":"三国：神算鬼谋，我选择辅佐曹操","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283048","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4368人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7320592643455468094","read_count":"4368","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1115627"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"564","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,三国,无女主,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/488e6d63adec8f2aab036a19dd22e843~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445555&x-signature=kQ712Bjl78AWHB%2FyMMg6WOczVJI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"92508348493","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"118"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318255568A6E29DDC132E8739AE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"liste n_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10053,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1822},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7422517858177516312","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"首先，作者的文笔无疑是一大亮点，文字流畅而富有韵律。其次，作者有关历史的知识储备令人印象深刻。在这部作品中，作者巧妙地融入了许多历史知识，使得故事的背景更加真实可信。最重要的是，剧情的设计非常精妙。没有无脑的剧情走向，而是通过精心设计的悬念和冲突，每一个情节的转折都经过深思熟虑，每一个角色的选择都有其合理性。番茄里这样的书不多，但不是没有。
不过作者大大更新是不是有点慢了(*￣rǒ￣)抠鼻屎，"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728194680,"group_id":"7317674546570480702","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"巷子里的猫很自由却没有归宿，人生这道题怎么选都有遗憾。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxyVnkTDrMsz5MHmT0utQFS6e3i/raDbEaf01mB0V0Gk","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b79aed6ea7f14270802675a2eacc48ab~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794207&x-signature=6uPed%2BAJO1y8robFEK3n%2BaRPvfI%3D","user_id":"3908100045407166","user_name":"千秋云雀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3908100045407166","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7317674546570480702","book_info":{"abstract":"《三国》《无系统》《无女主》《谋士文》
